rows.question: Which bowler conceded 49 runs in his first two overs?
rows.expected_output: Anrich Nortje conceded 49 runs in his first two overs.
rows.actual_output: Nortje conceded 49 runs in his first two overs.
retrieval_context: or Linde at deep backward square and Surya's scratchy knock is over. Just never found his timing. Despite that, he walks off with 30 off just 16. Suryakumar Yadav c Linde b Kwena Maphaka 30(16) [4s-2 6s-2] 12.2 6 Kwena Maphaka to Suryakumar Yadav, SIX, the ball is right there for it and he doesn't miss! Back of a length on leg, helps it on its way over fine leg 11.4 6 Linde to Axar, SIX, steps out and whacks it with the turn over midwicket. Don't think he was to the pitch but was able to use his reach nicely 11 W Marco Jansen to Tilak Varma, out Bowled!! Tilak has been bowled behind his legs. He didn't realise it and was running across for the single. The zing bails aren't in use today so it took some time for everyone to realise what happened. A yorker from round the wicket, looks to

aren't in use today so it took some time for everyone to realise what happened. A yorker from round the wicket, looks to flick it away, misses and it clips leg stump on the way. Length ball on leg, tries his trademark scoop but is through the shot early. Toe-ends it in the air to deep midwicket and Bosch makes a meal of it 10.1 4 Marco Jansen to Suryakumar Yadav, FOUR, another inside edge past the stumps! Good length across off, he looks to loft down the ground but the

e past the keeper and through to the fence 14.1 6 Rabada to Rinku Singh, SIX, what a shot! Rinku Singh advances down the track, makes a bit of room for himself and smashes it over wide long-off for a maximum. Trusted the bounce and hit it on the up with aplomb 13.5 4 Markram to Rinku Singh, FOUR, streaky but counts! Rinku Singh uses his feet and Markram spots that and drags his length back. Rinku throws his bat at it and manages to get a thick edge past the keeper 13 W Kwena Maphaka to Suryakumar Yadav, out Caught by Linde!! Runs out of luck! Slower one angling away wide of off, tries shoveling it behind square on the on-side but gets a thick top- edge. Simple catch for Linde at deep backward square and Surya's scratchy knock is over. Just never found his timing. Despite that, he walks

. Just a flick of the wrists as he whips it over deep backward square leg for a flat maximum. He generated so much power with his bottom hand there 17.3 6 Nortje to Hardik Pandya, SIX, Hardik Pandya doesn't need any sighters! A slower full-toss angling in, Hardik Pandya is early into the big hit actually but his bat swing and power helps him. His bottom hand comes off the handle but he still gets it over long-on for a maximum 17.2 W Nortje to Rinku Singh, out Caught by Stubbs!! Some respite for Nortje! He was smashed for 49 runs in his first two overs but now has something to smile about! A pitched up delivery on off, Rinku Singh clears his front leg and tries to hit it downtown but only manages to get it off the toe- end towards long-on. Stubbs moves across to his right and gets low to

leg, goes hard on the cross-batted smash and connects well enough 2.3 6 Rabada to Ishan Kishan, SIX, what form he's in! Good length from Rabada, it's around middle and Kishan effortlessly picks it up over midwicket 2 4 Marco Jansen to Ishan Kishan, FOUR, in the slot and punished! Pitched up from Jansen, right in the hitting arc and Kishan lofts it comfortably over mid-off. Already off to a flier! Might've been the slower one but got the length wrong 0.5 6 Ngidi to Ishan Kishan, SIX, too easy! Full delivery swinging down the leg-side, free swing for Kishan who dumps it over fine leg 0.2 6 Ngidi to Ishan Kishan, SIX, first one of the evening! Full and straight, hint of inswing and Kishan whacks it over mid-on to clear the ropes. Lovely swing of the bat!

rows.question: How was Suryakumar Yadav eventually dismissed and who took the catch?
rows.expected_output: Suryakumar Yadav was caught by Linde off Kwena Maphaka.
rows.actual_output: Suryakumar Yadav was eventually dismissed caught by Linde off the bowling of Kwena Maphaka. He was out after trying to shovel a slower ball behind square on the on-side, resulting in a thick top-edge that led to a simple catch for Linde at deep backward square.
retrieval_context: aren't in use today so it took some time for everyone to realise what happened. A yorker from round the wicket, looks to flick it away, misses and it clips leg stump on the way. Tilak Varma b Marco Jansen 45(19) [4s-3 6s-3] 10.5 4 Marco Jansen to Tilak Varma, FOUR, round the wicket, short of length across off, and it's swatted wide of mid-on. Fielder gets a hand diving across but it still runs away 10.2 Marco Jansen to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, dropped! Suryakumar having all the luck out there! Length ball on leg, tries his trademark scoop but is through the shot early. Toe-ends it in the air to deep midwicket and Bosch makes a meal of it 10.1 4 Marco Jansen to Suryakumar Yadav, FOUR, another inside edge past the stumps! Good length across off, he looks to loft down the ground but the

or Linde at deep backward square and Surya's scratchy knock is over. Just never found his timing. Despite that, he walks off with 30 off just 16. Suryakumar Yadav c Linde b Kwena Maphaka 30(16) [4s-2 6s-2] 12.2 6 Kwena Maphaka to Suryakumar Yadav, SIX, the ball is right there for it and he doesn't miss! Back of a length on leg, helps it on its way over fine leg 11.4 6 Linde to Axar, SIX, steps out and whacks it with the turn over midwicket. Don't think he was to the pitch but was able to use his reach nicely 11 W Marco Jansen to Tilak Varma, out Bowled!! Tilak has been bowled behind his legs. He didn't realise it and was running across for the single. The zing bails aren't in use today so it took some time for everyone to realise what happened. A yorker from round the wicket, looks to

e past the keeper and through to the fence 14.1 6 Rabada to Rinku Singh, SIX, what a shot! Rinku Singh advances down the track, makes a bit of room for himself and smashes it over wide long-off for a maximum. Trusted the bounce and hit it on the up with aplomb 13.5 4 Markram to Rinku Singh, FOUR, streaky but counts! Rinku Singh uses his feet and Markram spots that and drags his length back. Rinku throws his bat at it and manages to get a thick edge past the keeper 13 W Kwena Maphaka to Suryakumar Yadav, out Caught by Linde!! Runs out of luck! Slower one angling away wide of off, tries shoveling it behind square on the on-side but gets a thick top- edge. Simple catch for Linde at deep backward square and Surya's scratchy knock is over. Just never found his timing. Despite that, he walks

ntact with the ropes 7.2 6 Linde to Tilak Varma, SIX, gets hold of this one! Absolutely massive! Floated up just outside off, dips on him but he reaches out and clobbers it over long-on 5.4 F Kwena Maphaka to Ishan Kishan, SIX, huge swipe across the line and the slower ball disappears! Full in the slot, Kishan goes hard and whacks it over midwicket. Brings up fifty off just 23 balls and is walking back to the dugout! Retired out! Surya welcomes him back with a pat on his helmet 5 6 Nortje to Ishan Kishan, SIX, don't think Kishan knew much about that but he'll take it. Has a smile as he walks to Abhishek. Sharp bumper from round the wicket, seemed like a half-hearted pull, almost like he was bailing out of the shot. Flies off the top-edge over fine leg 4.5 4 Nortje to Ishan Kishan, FOUR,

kumar Yadav, FOUR, another inside edge past the stumps! Good length across off, he looks to loft down the ground but the balance isn't the greatest. Drags it back and gets lucky 10 4 Markram to Tilak Varma, FOUR, flat at the stumps, Tilak makes room and slaps it away through backward point. Races away in the gap! 9.3 4 Markram to Suryakumar Yadav, FOUR, goes for a big swipe across the line and drags it past leg stump off the inside edge! Was full in the slot and he didn't hold himself back 9 6 Nortje to Tilak Varma, SIX, and six more to finish! 49 off two overs for Nortje! Full outside off, in the slot and Tilak needs no second invitation as he launches it over long-off 8.5 6 Nortje to Tilak Varma, SIX, wow, just wow! Advances down to a fast length ball and smokes it over mid-on. Nortje
rows.reason_for_score: The score is 0.58 because the first node in retrieval contexts is irrelevant — it only says '10.2 Marco Jansen to Suryakumar Yadav, 1 run, dropped!' and 'does not state his eventual dismissal or who took the catch' — while the second and third nodes in retrieval contexts contain the key answer: 'Suryakumar Yadav c Linde b Kwena Maphaka 30(16)' and 'out Caught by Linde!!' with a 'Simple catch for Linde at deep backward square.' The score is not higher because an irrelevant node is ranked above both relevant nodes, and additional irrelevant nodes appear in the fourth and fifth nodes in retrieval contexts. It is still at this level because the two relevant nodes are ranked near the top, especially in the second and third positions, so the correct dismissal details are retrieved prominently even if not perfectly ordered.
